---
title: "Research artefacts"
listing:
  contents:
    - "*.qmd"
    - "!index.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "title"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, categories]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
---

Interactive and visual artefacts from the A=1 Discrete Causal Lattice
series — 3D models of the lattice substrate, animations of Arnold-
tongue lock-in / unlock dynamics, and standalone visualisations that
don't fit cleanly inside a paper figure.

Each artefact lists its provenance (which paper or experiment script
produced it) and provides a viewer or download link.
